Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Well? Do you notice anything different about me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I had an appointment at the spa for a facial peel... Isn't my skin simply radiant now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I had my hair revitalized! Doesn't it look healthier now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}It's quite a hassle, but appearances are a big part of the job in my line of work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}That said, I'm the total opposite at home. I dress like a slob and only shower every three days.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Imagine an organically grown cucumber that looks all deformed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Compare that to a cucumber that looks perfect, but was grown using chemical fertilizers and pesticides.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Which one do you think the supermarket would rather stock?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}In an ideal world, they'd offer safe and delicious vegetables regardless of their appearance...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}But in reality, supermarkets line their shelves with the prettiest cucumbers they can find.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Awkwardly-shaped cucumbers don't pack together very well, so stores prefer straight ones.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Taste and safety aren't even a consideration. They'll carry cucumbers that even pests wouldn't eat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}So, why do consumers still buy these cucumbers when they know the truth?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Simple. People trust what they see. The world is governed more by appearances than realities.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}That's why, as much as I hate spending money, I buy expensive ties to win people's trust...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Wait. You know what I just said earlier?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}The part about me dressing like a slob and not showering every day?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}Don't you dare tell ANYONE! I can't afford to have people start believing I'm ordinary![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}...I only admitted it to you personally. No one else has a clue, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}President Tanaka is opening up to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I understand him a little better now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}Just a reminder: do not tell a soul. If you break your promise...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Well, I guess I can trust you. Run along, now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After parting ways with President Tanaka,[n]I decided to return to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
